calendar.matters: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Third Amended Complaint

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Continued To Mar-01-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-01-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Arlen Litmen Cleper, Esq. 213-806-7276 Herman Law for Plaintiff.
Jeremy Sugarman, Esq. 415-969-6754 GKHS for Defendant CCSF.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
Mr. Litmen-Cleper contets and presents arguments; states timeline re Ex parte in D206.
The Court comments.
Mr. Sugarman suggest to amend contingent on a trial continuance.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF T.O.'s Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint.

Plaintiff T.O.'s Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
